name: YouTube Content
description: Find and embed YouTube videos and creator channels.

capabilities.description: Find a YouTube video on any topic (tutorials, reviews, education, entertainment).

query.description: The search query (e.g. 'how to fix a faucet', 'iphone 16 review').

capabilities.description: Find an official music video, live performance, or specific cover on YouTube.

query.description: The name of the artist and song.

video_type.description: The type of music video to find.

capabilities.description: Find a YouTube creator's channel and their latest content.

query.description: The name of the YouTuber or channel handle (e.g. 'MKBHD', '@mrbeast').
